note: Salary in INR/month. Timeline in years. HR and Human Resources are separate entries: HR = generalist/operational, Human Resources = strategic/specialist.

roles.title: Design Manager
roles.description: Manage a team of designers, set OKRs, run hiring and foster design culture across the product organisation

roles.title: Creative Director
roles.description: Set the creative vision for campaigns, products or brand; lead interdisciplinary creative teams end-to-end

roles.title: Head of Design
roles.description: Own design philosophy, team structure and design roadmap for the organisation across products and brand

roles.title: Chief Design Officer (CDO)
roles.description: C-suite leader defining experience identity, design-led innovation and design culture company-wide

roles.title: Music / Performing Arts Teacher
roles.description: Teach instrumental music, vocal training or performing arts to students in schools or private studios

roles.title: Junior Sound Engineer / Audio Engineer
roles.description: Operate recording studio equipment, assist in mixing and mastering tracks under senior engineer supervision

roles.title: Theatre Artist / Actor
roles.description: Perform in stage productions, ad films or OTT projects; develop characters through rehearsal and training

roles.title: Dancer / Choreographer (Junior)
roles.description: Perform in shows, music videos and events; assist choreographers in teaching dance routines

roles.title: Music Producer (Junior)
roles.description: Produce tracks for independent artists; arrange, record and mix music under the direction of a lead producer

roles.title: Acting / Drama Coach
roles.description: Train aspiring actors in voice, movement and character development through group classes and individual coaching

roles.title: Choreographer
roles.description: Create original dance and movement sequences for films, stage shows, music videos and live events

roles.title: Sound Engineer / Senior Audio Engineer
roles.description: Mix, master and produce professional-quality sound for albums, films, OTT and live events

roles.title: Music Composer / Film Score Composer
roles.description: Create original musical compositions for films, OTT, advertisements and game soundtracks

roles.title: Performing Arts Programme Manager
roles.description: Run performing arts schools, festivals or corporate entertainment programs; manage artists, venues and budgets

roles.title: Music Director / Musical Director
roles.description: Oversee all musical elements of a film, stage show or live event; work with composers, singers and orchestras

roles.title: Head of Creative Arts / Dean of Arts
roles.description: Lead a performing arts institution or creative arts division; manage faculty, programming and institutional partnerships

roles.title: Creative Producer / Artistic Director
roles.description: Lead creative vision for large-scale productions, entertainment companies or cultural institutions

roles.title: PR Executive / Communications Executive
roles.description: Draft press releases, manage media lists and coordinate PR logistics for campaigns and launches

roles.title: Social Media Executive (Comms)
roles.description: Manage brand voice across social platforms, craft timely responses and grow organic engagement

roles.title: PR Manager
roles.description: Lead media relations, pitch stories to journalists, manage agency relationships and own brand reputation

roles.title: Corporate Communications Manager
roles.description: Manage internal and external communications, CEO messaging and corporate narrative for large organisations

roles.title: Brand Communications Manager
roles.description: Define brand messaging, oversee ATL/BTL communication planning and manage integrated communications campaigns

roles.title: Crisis Communications Manager
roles.description: Prepare and execute crisis communication playbooks to protect organisational reputation during high-risk events

roles.title: Public Affairs Manager
roles.description: Manage government relations, regulatory communications and advocacy programs for corporates or industry bodies

roles.title: Investor Relations Manager
roles.description: Communicate financial results, strategy and ESG initiatives to institutional investors, analysts and stock exchanges

roles.title: Senior PR Manager / Communications Lead
roles.description: Lead PR strategy, manage key media relationships and oversee multiple communications programs simultaneously

roles.title: Head of PR / Head of Communications
roles.description: Own the entire communications function; define narrative strategy and manage all external and internal messaging

roles.title: Director of Communications
roles.description: Lead communications strategy across the enterprise, advise leadership on reputation and stakeholder engagement

roles.title: VP Communications / Chief Communications Officer
roles.description: C-suite communications executive managing global reputation, media strategy and executive visibility

roles.title: Corporate Affairs Director
roles.description: Lead government relations, public affairs and corporate communications strategy for large enterprises or regulated industries
